# François-Marie Arouet, known as Voltaire

*1694 – 1778 · French · [The Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md)*

French writer and philosopher, a leading figure of the [Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md), a tireless champion of tolerance and reason against fanaticism and the « Infamous Thing ».
